provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
BANKING ACT (SUPERVISORY REVIEW)

[L.S.371.16

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 371.16
REGOLAMENTI DWAR BANKING ACT
(SUPERVISORY REVIEW)*
10 ta’ April, 2015
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 127 tal-2015, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 76 tal2019, 493 tal-2021 u 253 tal-2024.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
